$comment: TokenMaxed in OpenClaw — merge into ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json. The plugin itself installs with: openclaw plugins install --link /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/TokenMaxed/packages/openclaw-plugin

hooks.$comment: allowConversationAccess is REQUIRED for the turn-end review (before_agent_finalize reads the conversation). The plugin requests its own hook timeout (340s, covering the review-child budget); this timeouts pin is belt-and-suspenders for operator policies that clamp plugin-requested timeouts. Overriding it BELOW ~340s is unsupported (reviews would time out fail-open every turn).
